terminal.tip_6: A missed entry beats a losing trade. Don't chase the market.
terminal.tip_7: Support and resistance levels are your main guides on the chart.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.subtitle: Trader reviews of Comfortrade - about the terminal, Forex and crypto trading, support and trade execution.
reviews.section_desc: Real reviews from traders who use Comfortrade for Forex and cryptocurrency trading
reviews.form_desc: Share your trading experience with Comfortrade
reviews.placeholder_review: Tell us about your trading experience with Comfortrade...
reviews.review1_text: Great broker! I've been trading for six months, everything works smoothly. Call/Put execution is fast, yield up to 89%. Convenient terminal and 24/7 support.
reviews.review2_text: Very satisfied with Comfortrade. Started with a demo account, then switched to real. The site's training helped me understand the basics. I recommend it for beginners!
reviews.review3_text: Good broker, everything suits me. Charts and indicators are top-notch. Fast withdrawals, transparent terms. I trade Forex and crypto.
reviews.review4_text: The best platform for Forex and crypto trading! Convenient terminal, you can trade anytime. High Call/Put yield. Thanks to the team!
reviews.review5_text: I trade on different platforms, but Comfortrade is one of the best. Honest yield, instant execution. Support is always available.
reviews.review6_text: Good platform for beginners. Demo account for practice - great! Started small, gradually increasing my deposit. Everything is transparent and clear.
reviews.review7_text: Professional terminal with excellent conditions. I trade EUR/USD, GBP/USD currency pairs. Fixed yield, no surprises. I recommend!
reviews.review8_text: Excellent service! Registration took 5 minutes. I trade Forex and crypto, everything works without glitches. Fast withdrawals. The platform is just right.

start.title: Getting Started
start.subtitle: Registration, verification, first deposit and first trades - a quick guide on how to start trading with COMFORTRADE.
start.step1_desc: Email, password - and you're done. Demo account is available immediately, no deposit required. Practice until you feel confident.
start.step2_desc: Card, e-wallets, crypto - whatever suits you. Minimum is low, you can start small.
start.step3_desc: Choose an asset, bet on rise or fall - and wait for the result. Works in the browser, even on your phone.
start.what_need_title: What you need to get started
start.card1_desc: Click "Create Account" on the main page. Enter your email and create a password. Confirm agreement with the terms - and your account is ready.
start.card2_desc: Demo account - free and risk-free. Try the platform with virtual balance. For real trading, fund your account using your preferred method.
start.card3_desc: Select a currency pair (EUR/USD, GBP/USD) or cryptocurrency (BTC, ETH). Study the chart and determine the price direction.
start.card4_desc: Enter the trade amount and expiration time. Choose Call (rise) or Put (fall). Open the trade - the result is known immediately after expiration.
start.education_desc: We've prepared a comprehensive training program for new traders, as well as collected proven strategies from experienced specialists
start.card_beginner_desc: Step-by-step lessons to help you master the basics of trading. From basic concepts to your first successful trades.
start.card_expert_desc: Proven trading strategies from traders and analysts. Learn how professionals achieve stable profits.
start.video_title: See how easy it is to trade with Comfortrade

support.page_subtitle: FAQ and how to reach us
support.msg_sent_hint: We will get back to you soon
support.faq_money_deposit_how_a: Go to Wallet → Deposit. Choose a payment method (Visa/Mastercard, Privat24, Binance Pay, crypto) and enter an amount from 200 to 1000 UAH. Funds are credited within minutes.
support.faq_money_deposit_limits_a: Minimum 200 UAH, maximum 1000 UAH per transaction. You can make multiple deposits per day.
support.faq_money_deposit_time_a: Visa/Mastercard and Privat24 are instant. Binance Pay and crypto take 1–5 minutes after blockchain confirmation. Bank transfers may take 1–3 business days.
support.faq_money_withdraw_how_a: In Wallet → Withdraw enter the amount (200–1000 UAH) and payout method. Requests are processed within 1–3 business days. Verified accounts are often faster.
support.faq_money_withdraw_limits_a: Minimum 200 UAH, maximum 1000 UAH per operation. Daily limits may be higher for verified users.
support.faq_money_withdraw_fee_a: We do not charge a withdrawal fee. Your bank or payment provider may charge fees — shown before you confirm.
support.faq_money_methods_a: Visa/Mastercard, Privat24, UAH card transfer, Binance Pay, Tether (TRC-20), Bitcoin, Ethereum and more. Available methods may differ for deposit vs withdrawal.
support.faq_trading_start_a: Open the Terminal, pick an asset (pair or crypto), expiration (5 seconds to 5 minutes) and amount. Choose Up or Down. The trade closes automatically when time expires.
support.faq_trading_demo_a: A demo account lets you practice without risk. You get a virtual balance and trade with live quotes — ideal for beginners.
support.faq_trading_expiry_a: Expiration is when the trade closes. You choose from 5 seconds to 5 minutes. At expiry the price is compared to entry: above — winning Up, below — winning Down.
support.faq_trading_payout_a: On a winning trade you earn 80% profit on the stake. Example: 100 UAH stake → 80 UAH profit if you win.
support.faq_trading_instruments_a: FX pairs (EUR/USD, GBP/USD, USD/JPY, …) and crypto (BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB). The full list is in the Terminal.
support.faq_trading_tie_a: If price at expiry equals entry, it is a tie. Your stake is returned with no profit or loss.
support.faq_security_verify_a: Confirm your email and upload ID (passport or ID card). Review usually takes up to 24 hours. Verification raises limits and speeds up withdrawals.
support.faq_security_2fa_a: In profile settings open Security and enable 2FA. Scan the QR in Google Authenticator or similar. Store backup codes safely.
support.faq_security_protect_q: How do I protect my account?
support.faq_security_protect_a: Use a strong password (8+ characters, mixed). Enable 2FA. Never share passwords or codes. Change your password periodically.
support.faq_security_suspicious_q: I see suspicious activity. What should I do?
support.faq_security_suspicious_a: Change your password immediately and enable 2FA if it is off. Contact support — we will review and block suspicious activity if needed.
support.faq_security_data_a: We use 256-bit SSL for all connections. Card data is handled by certified providers — we do not store full card data on our servers.
support.faq_account_email_q: How do I change my email?
support.faq_account_email_a: Contact support. Changing email requires identity verification for your security.
support.faq_account_password_q: How do I change my password?
support.faq_account_password_a: In your profile open security settings. Enter current and new password. Use a unique password you do not reuse elsewhere.
support.faq_account_delete_q: How do I delete my account?
support.faq_account_delete_a: In profile find Danger zone → Delete account. You will need a reason and password. This is permanent — all data will be removed.
support.faq_account_history_a: Wallet → Transaction history shows deposits and withdrawals with dates, methods and status.
support.faq_account_trades_a: In the Terminal open closed trades. Trading profile shows statistics and balance trend.
support.faq_other_minors_a: No. You must be 18+. Registration requires confirming your age.
support.faq_other_countries_a: The service is available in most countries. Some jurisdictions may be restricted under local law.
support.faq_other_taxes_q: Do I pay tax on profits?
support.faq_other_taxes_a: Tax depends on your country. Consult a tax professional. We provide history for your records.
support.faq_other_promo_q: How do I use a promo code?
support.faq_other_promo_a: On deposit enter the code in the Promo field and tap Apply. The bonus is credited after the deposit confirms.
support.faq_other_responsible_a: Only trade money you can afford to lose. Set limits; avoid emotional trading. Use self-exclusion tools if needed.

verification.intro_p1: To verify your account, upload documents proving your identity. This standard KYC step increases platform security and removes restrictions.
verification.intro_doc_id: Government-issued ID (passport, driver license or ID card)
verification.intro_doc_address: Proof of address — not older than 3 months (optional)
verification.intro_formats: Formats: JPG, PNG, PDF. Max file size 10 MB.
verification.country_subtitle: Country of citizenship — we use it to suggest the right documents
verification.pending_desc: We received your documents. Review usually takes up to 24 hours. We will email you the result.
verification.pending_support: If you have questions, contact support
verification.verified_desc: Your identity is confirmed. Withdrawals and full platform access are now available.
verification.rejected_desc: Your documents did not pass review. Please try uploading again or contact support.

newsArticles.item_1_title: EUR/USD rises on positive inflation data
newsArticles.item_1_excerpt: The euro strengthened after eurozone CPI beat analyst expectations.
newsArticles.item_1_body:
EUR/USD rose 0.4% after eurozone inflation data exceeded market forecasts. Year-on-year CPI rose 2.6%—analysts had expected 2.4%.

The ECB has not commented yet, but traders are already pricing a lower chance of further easing. Near-term resistance is at 1.0920, support at 1.0840.

Next week investors will watch the Fed chair and U.S. jobs data, which could shift the pair.
newsArticles.item_2_title: Bitcoin hits a new all-time high
newsArticles.item_2_excerpt: The largest cryptocurrency keeps posting strong results, drawing institutional interest.
newsArticles.item_2_body:
Bitcoin broke its record high amid rising institutional demand and expectations around the next halving. 24h trading volume topped $48bn—a year-to-date record.

Major hedge funds and ETF providers are adding exposure. On-chain data shows “whale” addresses holding over 1,000 BTC rose 12% last month.

Technically BTC/USD holds above the 200-day moving average. The next upside target is the psychological $100,000 level.
newsArticles.item_3_excerpt: The U.S. Federal Reserve decision moved major FX pairs.
newsArticles.item_3_body:
At the latest FOMC meeting, policymakers voted to keep the fed funds rate at 5.25–5.50%, in line with most forecasts.

Jerome Powell stressed the Fed still watches inflation data and is not rushing to ease. Markets sold off modestly: the S&P 500 fell 0.8% and the dollar strengthened against a basket of majors.

The next meeting is in May; futures imply a 28% chance of a cut.
newsArticles.item_4_excerpt: Analysts highlight support and resistance for Brent this week.
newsArticles.item_4_body:
Brent trades between $82–86 per barrel. Key support is $82.50; a break below opens $79. Resistance sits near $86.20.

OPEC+ is holding output steady, though some members hint at raising quotas if needed. U.S. crude inventories rose 3.2mn barrels last week—above expectations.

A stronger dollar also weighs on prices. Watch Wednesday’s EIA inventory data.
newsArticles.item_5_excerpt: Prices gain as geopolitical uncertainty supports safe-haven demand.
newsArticles.item_5_body:
Gold added 1.2% on the week, breaking above $2,380/oz. Safe-haven flows dominate amid heightened tensions in the Middle East.

Emerging-market central banks continue to build reserves. IMF data shows combined Q1 purchases exceeded 280 tonnes.

Technically, bulls formed a weekly flag; holding above $2,400 targets $2,450–2,480.
newsArticles.item_6_excerpt: Sterling swings as markets react to new negotiation headlines.
newsArticles.item_6_body:
GBP/USD ranged more than 130 pips over three sessions—among the widest this year—on uncertainty around new UK–EU trade discussions.

The Bank of England held rates at 5.00%, but rhetoric sounded more dovish at the last meeting. Next week’s UK CPI print could be decisive.

Technically the pair holds key support at 1.2640; a break targets 1.2580.
newsArticles.item_7_excerpt: Analysts flag important levels and chart patterns on USD/JPY.
newsArticles.item_7_body:
USD/JPY consolidates between 149.50 and 151.90. A symmetrical triangle on the daily chart could set direction for the next 2–3 weeks.

Japanese authorities remain intervention-shy for now, though officials warn they stand ready against sharp moves.

Bulls want acceptance above 151.50 to attack the yearly high near 152.00; bears defend 149.80.
newsArticles.item_8_excerpt: A look at altcoin prospects in the current cycle.
newsArticles.item_8_body:
Alongside the Bitcoin rally, several altcoins are outperforming. Ethereum gained 18% in two weeks, Solana 24%. Analysts cite DeFi and NFT activity as key drivers.

Layer-2 networks like Arbitrum and Optimism report record throughput; major protocol upgrades are planned for April.

Altcoins remain high-volatility instruments—risk management and diversification matter.
